subcodes.title: Words to Fugeta et al, spoken on 1920-01-10
subcodes.first_line: We are in a sweet place where our food is also sweet... Among the proofs of the teachings of the Blessed Perfection
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @wealth inequality and its moderation, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God, @interconnectedness of the teachings, @suffering and imprisonment, @universality of the Cause
